name: backup-restore
scenario: Create a backup of current configuration, make several changes (add, modify, delete variables), then restore from backup. Demonstrate both replace mode (full restore) and merge mode. Use diff to show what changed between backup and current state.
success_criteria: Creates initial configuration with multiple variables
Makes changes to configuration (add, modify, delete)
Uses diff command to show changes
Restores from backup in replace mode
anti_patterns: Not creating backup before making changes
Not using diff to verify changes
Confusing replace mode with merge mode
